text:

Log:
  Deprecate multimedia/gmerlin-avdecoder

  Nothing uses it, it looks unmaintained upstream, and it depends on
  the vulnerable multimedia/ffmpeg0.

  Approved by:	wg (maintainer timeout, 1.5 years)
